name: testWaitForDiagAuthCompleted, testWaitForDiagAuthGenericCompleted
title: testWaitForDiagAuthCompleted, testWaitForDiagAuthGenericCompleted
syntax: long testWaitForDiagAuthCompleted (char ecuQualifier[], char authenticationCall[]); // form 1
long testWaitForDiagAuthGenericCompleted(const char ecuQualifier, const char genericString); // form 2
description: Initiates the diagnostics authentication process and waits until this process has (generic) completed.

parameters.name: authenticationCall
parameters.description: Call that has to be accepted by the security source runtime implementation.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

parameters.name: genericString
parameters.description: Generic parameters to select and configure the security source runtime implementation.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
